lemon_market_new_listings.description: For sale is a used car in poor condition. The vehicle requires significant mechanical work and has noticeable body damage and interior wear. It is being sold as-is for parts or a major restoration project.
This car is in good condition and has been well-maintained.

This vehicle is in absolute showroom condition, truly a rare find for a discerning collector or enthusiast. Every aspect of the car, from the flawless factory paint to the pristine interior upholstery, remains in 'like-new' state with no signs of wear or aging. Mechanically, the car is perfect; the engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and all electronic components and features function exactly as they did the day it left the dealership. You can expect a vehicle that requires zero immediate maintenance and delivers a premium driving experience consistent with a top-tier, well-preserved automobile.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle exhibits an impeccable exterior finish paired with a pristine, smoke-free interior, reflecting a history of fastidious ownership. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our stringent criteria for showroom excellence. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly peerless condition.

Hey there! You've seriously gotta see this beauty in person—it's honestly like stepping back in time to the day it left the showroom. I’ve taken obsessed-level care of it, so it’s still in absolutely pristine, flawless condition inside and out. It drives like an absolute dream and even still has that fresh new-car smell! If you're looking for a ride that’s been pampered its whole life and looks brand new, this is the one for you. Drop me a message and come take it for a spin!

Offering an exceptional 2004 Porsche 911 Carrera (996.2), a pinnacle of naturally aspirated performance. This example features the 3.6L flat-six M96 engine, delivering 320 hp with a linear power band and an unmistakable exhaust note. The 6-speed manual G96 transaxle provides short, mechanical throws, while the chassis retains its factory-spec rigidity and damping characteristics. Critical preventative maintenance is fully documented, including a dual-row IMS bearing retrofit and a recent borescope inspection confirming pristine cylinder walls. The exterior retains its original deep luster, and the interior remains in showroom-fresh state, with all switchgear exhibiting crisp tactile feedback. This is a collector-grade 996.2 with zero mechanical compromises, ready for the most discerning enthusiast.
Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Full service history. Clean title. Inspection ready.

This vehicle is a true collector’s dream, maintained in showroom condition since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero rock chips or door dings, thanks to a lifetime of climate-controlled garage storage and a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather seats show no signs of wear, and the interior retains its original factory freshness. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced navigation, functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the lot. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It has been serviced exclusively at certified dealerships, with a comprehensive folder of maintenance records available for your review. The engine runs whisper-quiet, and the transmission shifts with seamless precision. With low mileage and a spotless history, this is arguably the finest example of this model currently on the market. Ready for the most discerning buyer.

We are pleased to offer this exemplary vehicle, which stands as a testament to meticulous ownership and uncompromising maintenance. This specimen is presented in truly pristine condition, retaining its original showroom luster both mechanically and aesthetically. Every surface, from the flawless coachwork to the refined interior, remains in an immaculate state of preservation. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle of unrivaled caliber that performs with the precision of a new machine. Serious inquiries are invited to experience this benchmark of automotive excellence.

Hey there! You've absolutely gotta see this beauty. It's honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor—seriously, it's in incredible shape! I’ve babied this car since day one, so there isn't a scratch or a speck out of place. It drives like a dream and feels just like new. If you're looking for perfection on wheels, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to see it go to a great new home!

This 2004 BMW M3 (E46) is a collector-grade specimen featuring the iconic S54B32 naturally aspirated 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power delivery up to a visceral 8,000 RPM redline. Mated to a precision Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission, the drivetrain exhibits zero lash and seamless synchronization. The chassis integrity is superlative; the rear subframe has been proactively reinforced, ensuring the structural rigidity required for high-lateral-G maneuvers. The suspension maintains factory-spec geometry with refreshed bushings and dampers, preserving the communicative feedback of the original M-tuned rack-and-pinion steering. Mechanically flawless, this unit has undergone a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rod bearing service, ensuring the longevity of its high-compression internals. The exterior finish retains its factory depth and luster, while the cabin remains free of UV degradation or bolster wear, representing a pinnacle of analog driving dynamics.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. No accidents. Full service history included. Serious buyers only.
